title: [MTMI] The Minecraft in Memories
description: A resource pack for experiencing low version resource in higher versions.
body:
# English

This is a resource pack for experiencing low version resource in higher versions.

# Why use it?

Because minecraft updated many item resource on 1.14, it's a bit difficult to accept.

Enable you to be more receptive to the new version of resource.

More resource will be added in future versions. If there are any errors, please https://github.com/cleanper/fps-plus--formc/issues Open a issues.

# Installation Guide

Please put this resource package into the resource package folder or interface in Minecraft, and then enable it. You can now check the effect.
without the awful performance hit!
Put all the files in the mods folder of the zip file into the 1.21.4 fabric mods folder to experience the complete content.

# chinese

这是一个资源包，用于在较高版本中体验低版本资源。

# 为什么要使用它？

因为我的世界在1.14上更新了许多项目资源，所以有点难以接受。

使您更容易接受资源的新版本。

未来版本中将添加更多资源。如果有任何错误，请https://github.com/cleanper/fps-plus--formc/issues 打开一个问题。

# 安装指南

请将此资源包放入Minecraft中的资源包文件夹或界面中，然后启用它。您现在可以检查效果。
没有性能下降！

将zip里面的mods文件夹里面的所有文件放入1.21.4 fabric mods文件夹就可以体验完整内容。
